This item can be used in tradeskills.

Capacity: 8 Size Capacity: LARGE
Backpack
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 3.0 Weight Reduction: 0%
Capacity: 8 Size Capacity: LARGE

Item Type:Container
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 5 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Divine
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 10:29:46
Page Updated:Tue Jan 20th, 2026

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Merchants | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Cheslin's Illusion Cards
Fisherman Convert
Hopeless Love, Part 1
Lizard Dolls
Skeleton Killing
Zombie Flesh
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.

    • Expansion: Not Set
    Yield: 1 x Backpack, 20 x Pattern for Barbarian Boots, 20 x Pattern for Barbarian Gloves, 20 x Pattern for Barbarian Helms, 20 x Pattern for Barbarian Leggings, 20 x Pattern for Barbarian Sleeves, 20 x Pattern for Barbarian Tunics, 40 x Pattern for Barbarian Wristguards

This item can be Vendor Purchased:
Abysmal Sea

Tasec Dreeng @ -80, 205, 98, in the hold
Duath Untez @ -60, 240, 98

Ak'Anon
a clockwork merchant @ 1265, -777, -24, Near the mail quest bard
a clockwork priest @ 1200, -551, -38, In Abbey of Deep Musing
Drekon Vebnebber @ 866, -475, -28, In Gemchopper Hall
a clockwork rogue @ 1182, -558, -52, rogue guild, behind secret curtain in Abbey of Deep Musing

Butcherblock Mountains
Dandalek Swillslammer @ 2957, -203, 5

Rastok @ 348, 11, 5

Lybar @ 292, 523, -7

Ponila Quickfingers @ 193, -855, -47, first building on right as you zone out from West Freeport

Ralfson Gerositan @ -1670, -417, 8, just inside the zone from North Ro
Tyeg Envil @ 691, -707, -21
Farista Eniatia @ 97, 119, 26

Celanie X'toria @ -1326, 433, -50, in Necromancer guild
Jekel Enhied @ -1029, -829, 12, in bard guild

Ayth Niphiria @ -622, -83, 70

Fhania Aserdon @ -1094, -470, 54
Ghemna Nyjuss @ -1070, -398, 53
Luren Renthalis @ -1156, -61, 69, In building just to your left as you come in from Toxxulia Forest zoneline
Reihan Wilhemson @ -906, -88, 53, Through seconnd entrance into Erudin Surplus, second building to left comfing from Toxxulia Forest zoneline

Elona McMahon @ 212, 184, 32, Upstairs in bank building

High Keep
Merchant Dominik @ 37, 31, 0, In courtyard near entrance

Katta Castellum
Nannette Farcloud @ 240, -1114, 10, From TM zone take first pathway on left, then next left, then next right. In Bread Breaker's Baked Goods building also has a sign of a sword and shield resting on a chair beside the door.

Kelethin (in Greater Faydark)

# Apr 21 2004 at 8:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591804614091

These also drop off of bandits in Greater Faydark. Rarely.
▲ Page top
bags in bags
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2004 at 7:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258366302
154 posts
LOL. I remember when i was new to EQ...and I mean REALLY NEW I came up with this great (or so i thought) idea. 2 of my friends had been playing EQ for about a year or so before I started, and they were trying to explain the game to me (before I got it ofcourse). Anyways, we're all sitting around talking, and all of a sudden I go "Oh my god! I just got the BEST idea ever! You can get backpacks in EverQuest, right?". My friend looks at me and goes "Ya man, you can get backpacks...". So then, in my moment of genious I go "You could put backpacks INSIDE backpacks and have alot more storage!!!" (Keep in mind I said this in about the mose highpitched excited voice ever). Both my friends start cracking up and just walk away, and I'm thinkin "What? Did I use the wrong terminoligy?"

LOL, I look back on it now and think "Man, i was a nooooooob!". Aww, the good ol days *sigh* But hey! We were all new once right? And we all said stupid stuff....just maybe not THAT stupid.

Hehe, hope yall got a grin outa this =)
▲ Page top
bags in bags
